recommendations.title: 30 Nights of Paranormal Activity With the Devil Inside the Girl With the Dragon Tattoo
recommendations.overview: After a stint in a psychiatric hospital, a young woman returns to the house where her father killed the entire cast of The Artist during his exorcism.

recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: Woman of the Hour
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer in '70s LA when they're cast on an episode of "The Dating Game."

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Dad Wanted
recommendations.overview: What does a thrill-seeker tween girl do when her mom forbids her to enter a BMX race? Cast an actor with nothing to lose to play her approving dad.

recommendations.title: The Last Rite
recommendations.overview: Based on True Events: Suffering from sleep paralysis, a medical student falls prey to a demonic force that wants to rip her apart from within. Torn between sanity and the unknown, she's left with no alternative but to contact a local priest for help.

recommendations.title: Nise: The Heart of Madness
recommendations.overview: After being released from prison, Dr. Nise da Silveira is back at work in a psychiatric hospital on the outskirts of Rio de Janeiro where she refuses to employ the new and violent electroshock in the treatment of schizophrenics. Ridiculed by doctors,

recommendations.title: The Ward
recommendations.overview: Kristen, a troubled young woman, is captured by the police after burning down a farmhouse and is locked in the North Bend Psychiatric Hospital. Soon, she begins to suspect that the place has a dark secret at its core and she's determined to find out

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A young girl is kidnapped during a powerful storm. Her mother joins forces with her mysterious neighbour to set off in pursuit of the kidnapper. Their journey will test their limits and expose the dark secrets of their past.

recommendations.title: Your Eyes Tell
